notes: Authoritative registry of every upstream source feeding the Palestine Data Backend. Each entry declares update cadence, time coverage, license, and which unified categories or databank tables it populates. Read by /api/v1/sources; consumed by the refresh pipeline to surface per-source health.

ocha_hpc_pse.name: OCHA Humanitarian Programme Cycle — Response Plans + Needs (PSE)
ocha_hpc_pse.organization: OCHA Humanitarian Programme Cycle Tools (HPC Tools)
ocha_hpc_pse.attribution_text: OCHA Humanitarian Programme Cycle Tools (HPC Tools) via HDX (CC-BY-IGO).
ocha_hpc_pse.notes: Combines hrp-projects-pse (Response Plan + Flash projects per year) and opt-humanitarian-needs (annual PiN by sector). UN FTS funding flows are NOT here — those live in /unified/funding via the existing per-flow API.

fao_diem_pse.name: FAO DIEM Household Surveys (PSE-filtered)
fao_diem_pse.organization: Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) of the United Nations
fao_diem_pse.notes: DIEM aggregated household surveys filtered to PSE rows; 4 themes (food security, income shocks, livestock, crop production); ~80 PSE rows total but updated daily upstream.

world_bank_wbg.name: World Bank — Combined Indicators for West Bank and Gaza
world_bank_wbg.notes: 2,501 distinct indicators × time series for West Bank and Gaza. Pivoted to per-indicator time series so /:code serves any single indicator quickly.

unhcr_pop_pse.name: UNHCR — Population Data for State of Palestine (POC stocks, demographics, asylum)
unhcr_pop_pse.attribution_text: UNHCR — The UN Refugee Agency via HDX (CC-BY-IGO).
unhcr_pop_pse.notes: End-year POC stock figures (refugees, asylum seekers, IDPs, stateless) by year x asylum-country, plus demographics and asylum applications. ~1,859+ rows.

idmc_stocks_pse.name: IDMC — Internal Displacement (new + total) for State of Palestine
idmc_stocks_pse.notes: Conflict-driven and disaster-driven new displacement annual aggregates. Distinct from the existing event-level IDMC fetcher.

ipc_food_insecurity_pse.name: IPC — Acute Food Insecurity Country Data (PSE)
ipc_food_insecurity_pse.attribution_text: Integrated Food Security Phase Classification (IPC) via HDX (public domain).
ipc_food_insecurity_pse.notes: IPC phase polygons (1=Minimal … 5=Famine) per Palestinian region with population-in-phase + render colors. Drop-in humanitarian severity heatmap.

awsd_pse.name: Aid Worker Security Database (AWSD) — Palestine
awsd_pse.attribution_text: Aid Worker Security Database (AWSD) via HDX (CC-BY-4.0).
awsd_pse.notes: Cross-validation source for /incidents/aid-worker (default = Insecurity Insight). AWSD applies an annual verification process and is the canonical reference for aid-worker security incidents (1997-present). 630+ rows for PSE.

hdx_hapi_pse.name: HDX HAPI — Humanitarian API for State of Palestine
hdx_hapi_pse.notes: 10 thematic datasets normalized into one schema with admin1/admin2 codes (refugees, returnees, funding, conflict events, national risk, food security, food prices, poverty rate, baseline population, metadata). ~53k rows total — single-source view across what would otherwise be 10 separate fetchers.

global_healthsites_pse.name: Global Healthsites Mapping Project — Palestinian Territories
global_healthsites_pse.attribution_text: Global Healthsites Mapping Project via HDX (ODbL).
global_healthsites_pse.notes: Cross-validation source for /facilities/health (default = OSM). 2,208 health facility points; richer institution-type metadata than raw OSM tags.

hot_osm_pse.name: Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team — PSE facility points (health, education, populated places)
hot_osm_pse.attribution_text: OpenStreetMap contributors via Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT) (ODbL).
hot_osm_pse.notes: OSM-derived points (1,864 health facilities, 2,162 education facilities, 1,159 populated places). Feeds /facilities endpoints + powers hospital/school enrichment on alerts.

ocha_cod_ab_pse.name: OCHA Common Operational Datasets — Subnational Administrative Boundaries (PSE)
ocha_cod_ab_pse.attribution_text: OCHA Field Information Services Section (FISS) via HDX (CC-BY-IGO).
ocha_cod_ab_pse.notes: Official OCHA admin0/1/2 polygons (Palestine outline, West Bank + Gaza, 16 governorates) + adminlines + adminpoints. Powers polygon overlays + point-in-polygon reverse geocoding.

insecurity_insight.name: Insecurity Insight — Attacks on Healthcare/Aid/Education/Food/Water (PSE)
insecurity_insight.notes: Incident-level data on attacks against healthcare workers, aid workers, education, food/water systems, plus protection-in-danger and conflict-related sexual violence. 16 XLSX sub-datasets parsed into one canonical schema; ~19,000 unique PSE incidents across 8 categories.

tech4palestine_summary.name: Tech4Palestine v3 Summary
tech4palestine_summary.notes: Cumulative casualty totals (Gaza + West Bank). Primary source for /databank/totals headline numbers.

tech4palestine_daily.name: Tech4Palestine Daily Bulletins
tech4palestine_daily.attribution_text: Gaza Ministry of Health daily bulletins, mirrored by Tech4Palestine (CC-BY-4.0).
tech4palestine_daily.notes: 923+ days of per-day delta + cumulative figures (killed, injured, children, women, medics, press, civil_defence, famine, aid_seekers).

tech4palestine_martyrs.name: Tech4Palestine Killed-in-Gaza Roster
tech4palestine_martyrs.notes: 60,200 named individuals with name (ar+en), age, sex. Identified-killed only; lags cumulative MoH total by ~12k as of 2026-04.

tech4palestine_infrastructure.name: Tech4Palestine Infrastructure Damaged
tech4palestine_infrastructure.organization: Tech for Palestine (mirrors Gaza Government Media Office)
tech4palestine_infrastructure.attribution_text: Data: Tech4Palestine / Gaza Government Media Office (CC-BY-4.0).

world_bank.name: World Bank Open Data
world_bank.attribution_text: Data: The World Bank (data.worldbank.org), licensed CC-BY-4.0.
world_bank.notes: 411+ Palestine indicators. Latest released vintage typically lags 12-24 months. PCBS-republished indicators routed through this same API.

imf_datamapper.name: IMF DataMapper (WEO)
imf_datamapper.attribution_text: Data: IMF DataMapper / World Economic Outlook (imf.org), licensed CC-BY-4.0.
imf_datamapper.notes: WEO published April + October each year. 18 indicators with WBG (Palestine) coverage: real GDP growth, inflation (latest 2025), population, current account, government debt, unemployment.

addameer.name: Addameer Prisoner Statistics
addameer.organization: Addameer Prisoner Support and Human Rights Association
addameer.attribution_text: Data: Addameer Prisoner Support and Human Rights Association (addameer.ps).
addameer.notes: Monthly aggregate counts (total / administrative / child / female prisoners). Web-scraped from highchart data attributes.

unhcr_odp.name: UNHCR Operational Data Portal
unhcr_odp.organization: United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees
unhcr_odp.attribution_text: Data: UNHCR Operational Data Portal (unhcr.org), licensed CC-BY-4.0.
unhcr_odp.notes: Palestinian refugee populations by country of asylum, year by year. ~1,200 records.

un_ocha_fts.name: UN OCHA Financial Tracking Service
un_ocha_fts.organization: UN Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs
un_ocha_fts.attribution_text: Funding flows: UN OCHA Financial Tracking Service (fts.unocha.org), licensed CC-BY-IGO-3.0.
un_ocha_fts.notes: 9,000+ humanitarian funding flows: appeals, donors, clusters, recipients.

who_hdx.name: WHO Health Indicators (via HDX)
who_hdx.attribution_text: Data: WHO Global Health Observatory, licensed CC-BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO.
who_hdx.notes: WHO indicators republished via HDX. 38k+ historical records (life expectancy, vaccination, mortality). Non-commercial license — paid-tier consumers should query without WHO source filter.

ocha_opt_hdx.name: UN OCHA oPt (via HDX)
ocha_opt_hdx.organization: UN Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs (occupied Palestinian territory)
ocha_opt_hdx.attribution_text: Data: UN OCHA oPt (ochaopt.org), licensed CC-BY 3.0 IGO.
ocha_opt_hdx.notes: OCHA-oPt humanitarian datasets pulled from HDX CKAN. WASH, education access, infrastructure damage, locality records.

peace_now.name: Peace Now Settlement Watch
peace_now.notes: West Bank settlements registry — boundaries, populations, expansion approvals.

wikidata_culture.name: Wikidata SPARQL (Heritage Sites)
wikidata_culture.notes: Cultural heritage sites in Palestine via SPARQL. Snapshot of currently-known sites; not a time series of incidents.

rss_news_feeds.name: International + Palestinian News RSS Feeds
rss_news_feeds.organization: Various (Al Jazeera, BBC, Reuters, Haaretz, Mondoweiss, Electronic Intifada, Middle East Eye, Amnesty, HRW, Anadolu, IMEMC, PalInfo, Al Araby)
rss_news_feeds.attribution_text: Headlines from respective publishers; all rights reserved by source.
rss_news_feeds.notes: Headlines + source URL + summary only. No full-article redistribution.

idmc.name: IDMC Internal Displacement Updates
idmc.attribution_text: Displacement events: Internal Displacement Monitoring Centre (idmc.ch), CC-BY-IGO.
idmc.notes: Per-event internal displacement (storms, floods, conflict-violence) with geocoding + figure + source attribution. Complements UNHCR (cross-border) with internal events.

ucdp_ged.name: UCDP Georeferenced Event Dataset
ucdp_ged.attribution_text: Conflict events: Uppsala Conflict Data Program (ucdp.uu.se), CC-BY-IGO.
ucdp_ged.notes: 7,800+ Palestine-related conflict events with lat/lng, casualty counts, source attribution. Academic gold-standard. Backfills /unified/conflict pre-2000 (Tech4Palestine starts Sep 2000).

good_shepherd.name: Good Shepherd Collective Healthcare Data
good_shepherd.notes: Healthcare facility incidents + facility censuses. Currently stale; verify source before relying.

planned_additions.reason: Daily HR signal; only Peace Now currently
Restore historical category with UN Palestine archives
